items.headline: TJ Friedl has 3-run double in 9th, and Reds rally for 7-4 win in 10 for 3-game sweep of Twins
items.description: — TJ Friedl hit a go-ahead, three-run double in the ninth inning, Rece Hinds added a two-run double in the 10th, and the Cincinnati Reds rallied past the Minnesota Twins 7-4 on Sunday for a three-game sweep.

items.headline: Cardinals top Astros 7-5 in 10 innings to extend win streak to 5 games
items.description: — Masyn Winn cleared the bases with a double down the third base line, and the St. Louis Cardinals won their fifth straight game, beating the Houston Astros 7-5 in 10 innings on Sunday.

items.headline: Indiana DC Bryant Haines claps back at Ty Simpson, Alabama fans
items.description: Indiana defensive coordinator Bryant Haines heard the comments from former Alabama quarterback Ty Simpson about the teams' matchup last season in the Rose Bowl and responded with his own observations.

items.headline: World Snooker Championship 2026: Results, schedule, how to watch, prize money, winners, more
items.description: Everything you need to know about the 2026 World Snooker Championship as Zhao Xintong, Ronnie O'Sullivan and Co. bid for glory at the Crucible Theatre.

items.headline: WWE WrestleMania 42 Night 2: Live match results and analysis
items.description: ESPN breaks down all the action from Night 2 of WrestleMania 42 in Las Vegas.

items.headline: Mets' losing streak reaches 11 games; longest since 2004
items.description: Nico Hoerner hit a sacrifice fly off Craig Kimbrel in the 10th inning as the Cubs extended the Mets' losing streak to 11 games by rallying for a 2-1 victory.

items.headline: Fantasy baseball lineup advice for Monday: Seth Lugo tops streaming options
items.description: Everything you need to know to set your fantasy baseball lineups for Monday's MLB action.

items.headline: ESPN's Brownlow Medal predictor and tracker - every vote for 2026
items.description: The Brownlow Medal is the highest individual honour in the AFL. In 2026, ESPN is giving you an advantage with our one-of-a-kind predictor.

items.headline: Who are the top scorers in Premier League history?
items.description: Alan Shearer has scored the most goals in Premier League history. Which other players are at the top of the list? Check out the breakdown now.

items.headline: Pérez outpitches Misiorowski as Marlins top Brewers 5-3 to stop 4-game slide
items.description: — Eury Pérez allowed three hits in six strong innings after Miami dinged Jacob Misiorowski for three runs in the first, and the Marlins beat the Milwaukee Brewers 5-3 on Sunday.

items.headline: Harry Kane vows Bayern Munich have 'a lot to play for' after Bundesliga title
items.description: Harry Kane insists Bayern Munich still have "a lot to play for" this season after winning the Bundesliga title following their 4-2 thrashing over Stuttgart on Sunday.

items.headline: 76ers face familiar playoff fate as Celtics dominate Game 1
items.description: The Celtics are off to a good start in their hopes to hand Philadelphia its seventh straight series loss between the rivals.

items.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Bayern, Madrid in race to sign Tottenham's Sarr
items.description: Both Bayern Munich and Real Madrid are competing to sign Tottenham midfielder Pape Matar Sarr. Transfer Talk has the latest.

items.headline: Stanley Cup playoffs 2026: Bracket, schedule, scores, news
items.description: From the first round all the way through the Stanley Cup Final, ESPN has you covered this NHL postseason.

items.headline: PSG suffer huge blow as Lyon victory opens up title race
items.description: Ligue 1 leaders Paris Saint-Germain suffered a shock defeat as Lyon boosted their hopes of playing Champions League football next season with a 2-1 success at Parc des Princes.
